text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking around campus, I happen to see
Biwa Hayahide and Air Groove talking with each
other.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In short, I apologize for Brian's continued absence
from student council meetings...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you needn't apologize. I'm quite accustomed
to her absence, actually. And to the president's as
well, what with her outings.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That said, today's meeting concerns a matter of
some urgency, which means it can't be postponed
over an absence or two.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: In that case, allow me to attend in Brian's place.
choice_data_list:
You're going to help out with the student
council?

You're going to help out with the student
council?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, precisely. I'm sorry but it appears today's
training session might suffer a small delay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Biwa Hayahide is attending, I decide to
take the opportunity to sit in and observe the
meeting myself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
So, to start with, if you would all turn your
attention to the screen for today's topic...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Wait... where's the file? Who was the last person
to update this?

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm sorry! I think this might be my fault!
Umm... I'm sure the data was in here—oh no!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Forget it. We haven't the time to spare. I'll just
improvise.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That won't be necessary. I've prepared the
relevant data. Here, I'll put it through the
projector.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Really? I appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's this? I don't remember creating any
graphs...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I whipped that up a moment ago. I figured
that the information would be easier to digest
this way.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...All right. Well, it seems we've heard most of
your opinions. Does anyone have any questions
before we vote?

text_block_list.name: Absentminded Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Um, would you mind repeating that thing you
mentioned earlier? What was it—I think it had to
do with the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's a little vague... Do you at least remember
whose statement it was?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. I'm reviewing the meeting transcript.
The statement was made by the third speaker.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It reads as follows, "Since the number of students
in attendance has risen, I propose that we
increase each dorm's stock of household
supplies."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excellent work today, Air Groove. I think the
meeting concluded without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide! Would you consider joining the student
council?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I know I've extended you countless invitations
before, but today you convinced me! Your
presence in the council would solve so many of
our problems!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I agree with Air Groove. I only joined the meeting
midway through, but from what I saw, your
contributions were magnificent.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
With all due respect... I'm afraid I would lack the
flexibility to balance council responsibilities with
racing. Trainer, would you agree?
choice_data_list: Why not try it out for a day?

What if you join on the condition that they look
after your sister?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Just for a day? I suppose I could manage that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Biwa Hayahide spends the rest of her day
helping the student council with their work.
However...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The pool's temperature setting? Yes, I do wonder
why it's been set at this many degrees. Hmm, I
might find the reason if I trace backwards through
these records.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There are daily scrambles to purchase baked
goods from the school store? Well, increasing the
stock should solve that issue, but I wonder if
something else is at play here... Okay, I'll look
into it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's her tendency to go the extra mile, but
Biwa Hayahide always has trouble knowing when
to clock out...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide, is everything okay? You do
realize it's nighttime? I believe you're pushing
yourself a little hard...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's already nighttime?! I'm sorry, I didn't notice at
all! Perhaps I was right to presume I'm not cut out
for this...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, the role does require that you set your
priorities properly. Let's have you take a hiatus
from student council for now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But she was getting so much done... Urk! So close!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I see... That's a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian always goes overboard the minute I let her
out of my sight. But I can't keep an eye on her all
day long. With the help of the student council,
though...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid I must object. We don't have the means
to manage that one.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. We supervise her where possible, but full
custody would be a tall order.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I see... Then, please forget we ever discussed this.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Still, Hayahide, you're welcome to join the student council whenever you feel so inclined! And I do mean whenever!
